channel.title: Thales Group — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Thales Group (tha-psirt).

item.title: CVE-2026-13014 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Remote Code Execution vulnerability in "Suspicious" application
item.description: A vulnerability in Thales CERT "Suspicious" application =< 1.3.4 allows a remote and unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code and arbitrarily overwrite writable application files—including Python modules, configuration files, cron inputs, a…

item.title: CVE-2026-6805 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Vulnerability on Cryptobox external sharing feature
item.description: Vulnerability on the external sharing feature in Cryptobox allows an attacker knowing a sharing link URL to retrieve information from the server allowing an offline brute-force attack of the access code associated to this sharing link.

item.title: CVE-2026-5794 · 4.9 MEDIUM — Vulnerability in Cryptobox allows an authenticated user to trigger an account lockout
item.description: A vulnerability affecting the detailed versions of Cryptobox allows a legitimate user to prevent another to login by triggering an account lockout via sending a specially crafted request.

item.title: CVE-2026-3457 · 7 HIGH — Stored XSS vulnerability in Sentinel ACC
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in Thales Sentinel LDK Runtime on Windows allows Stored XSS.This issue affects Sentinel LDK Runtime: before 10.22.

item.title: CVE-2026-0872 · 2.5 LOW — Improper Certificate Validation vulnerability in Thales SafeNet Agent for Windows Logon
item.description: Improper Certificate Validation vulnerability in Thales SafeNet Agent for Windows Logon on Windows allows Signature Spoofing by Improper Validation.This issue affects SafeNet Agent for Windows Logon: 4.0.0, 4.1.1, 4.1.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-0873 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Privilege Elevation in Ercom Cryptobox administration console
item.description: On a Cryptobox platform where administrator segregation based on entities is used, some vulnerabilities in Ercom Cryptobox administration console allows an authenticated entity administrator with knowledge to elevate his account to global administrat…

item.title: CVE-2025-14266 · 0.6 LOW 🌩️ — CSRF in Ercom Cryptobox administration console
item.description: CSRF in Ercom Cryptobox administration console allows attacker to trigger some actions on behalf of a Cryptobox administrator. The attack requires the administrator to browse a malicious web site or to click a link while he has an open session on the…

item.title: CVE-2024-5264 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Network Key Transfer with AES KHT vulnerability in Luna EFT
item.description: Network Transfer with AES KHT in Thales Luna EFT 2.1 and above allows a user with administrative console access to access backups taken via offline analysis

item.title: CVE-2024-0197 · 7.8 HIGH — Privilege Escalation in Thales SafeNet Sentinel HASP LDK
item.description: A flaw in the installer for Thales SafeNet Sentinel HASP LDK prior to 9.16 on Windows allows an attacker to escalate their privilege level via local access.

item.title: CVE-2023-7016 · 7.8 HIGH — Privilege Escalation in SafeNet Authentication Client
item.description: A flaw in Thales SafeNet Authentication Client prior to 10.8 R10 on Windows allows an attacker to execute code at a SYSTEM level via local access.

item.title: CVE-2023-5993 · 7.8 HIGH — Privilege Escalation in SafeNet Authentication Client Installer
item.description: A flaw in the Windows Installer in Thales SafeNet Authentication Client prior to 10.8 R10 on Windows allows an attacker to escalate their privilege level via local access.

item.title: CVE-2023-2737 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Improper securing of log directory may allow a denial of service
item.description: Improper log permissions in SafeNet Authentication Service Version 3.4.0 on Windows allows an authenticated attacker to cause a denial of service via local privilege escalation.

item.title: CVE-2022-1293 · 5.7 MEDIUM — XSS vulnerability in Citadel
item.description: The embedded neutralization of Script-Related HTML Tag, was by-passed in the case of some extra conditions.

item.title: CVE-2021-42811 · 3.3 LOW — Vulnerability in SafeNet KeySecure
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in SafeNet KeySecure allows an authenticated user to read arbitrary files from the underlying system on which the product is deployed.

item.title: CVE-2021-42810 · 7.8 HIGH — Safenet Authentication Service Remote Desktop Gateway prior to 2.0.3 may allow privilege escilation to authenticated users
item.description: A flaw in the previous versions of the product may allow an authenticated attacker the ability to execute code as a privileged user on a system where the agent is installed.

item.title: CVE-2021-42808 · 6.5 MEDIUM — The Sentinel Protection Installer 7.7.0 creates files and directory with all privileges granting any user full permissions.
item.description: Improper Access Control in Thales Sentinel Protection Installer could allow a local user to escalate privileges.

item.title: CVE-2021-42138 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: A user of a machine protected by SafeNet Agent for Windows Logon may leverage weak entropy to access the encrypted credentials of any or all the users on that machine.

item.title: CVE-2021-42809 · 6.5 MEDIUM — The Sentinel Protection Installer 7.7.0 does not properly restrict loading Dynamic Link Library
item.description: Improper Access Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources (DLL) in Thales Sentinel Protection Installer could allow the execution of arbitrary code.
